instructions.defaultBehavior: Use 'agent_query' tool for ALL user requests. This tool automatically routes to specialized agents (PMAgent, CodeAgent, SearchAgent, etc.) and creates issues when needed.
instructions.pmRequests: When user asks to create issues, user stories, or requirements, the agent_query tool will automatically invoke PMAgent which creates issues in the database.
instructions.sessionManagement: Always pass sessionId to maintain conversation history and context across messages.
